programs.title: The Bad Foot Clinic
programs.desc: Marion solves the mystery of the V-shaped gap in Debra's toes; she has a surprising treatment for a psoriasis patient to stop the itch.

programs.title: One Day in My Body
programs.desc: Tiffany has progeria, a condition that causes her to age rapidly, yet she's already outlived her life expectancy; single dad Ryan was born with arthrogryposis, leaving his arms and legs fused.

programs.title: One Day in My Body
programs.desc: Lukas has Parry-Romberg Syndrome, causing half his face to shrink inward; Stefani's rare muscular dystrophy leaves her dependent on her mother but craving independence; Ellie says steroid withdrawal left her with lizard skin and seeks a cure.

programs.title: One Day in My Body
programs.desc: Following people whose extreme bodies force them to navigate life differently, capturing defining moments with unfiltered access to their world.

programs.title: The Bad Foot Clinic
programs.desc: Podiatrist Marion solves the mystery of Jonathan's twisted toes, gets marathon runner Robert's feet fit for his next race and helps a drag queen back into heels.

programs.title: The Bad Foot Clinic
programs.desc: Podiatrist Marion suggests toe surgery for a mother and daughter with similar issues; a gruesome treatment makes actor Jim anxious.
